item.title: cloud/ timeout and capacity constants not in config/defaults.ts
item.intent: All cloud module timeout and capacity constants have a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. No bare timeout literals or capacity magic numbers remain in cloud/.
item.description: Two constants in the cloud module are not centralized in config/defaults.ts, continuing the timeout-sweep pattern from BUG-038 through BUG-046. (1) src/cloud/heartbeat/reporter.ts:202 uses AbortSignal.timeout(10_000) as an inline literal for the health reporter RPC timeout. (2) src/cloud/commands/queue.ts:28 defines const MAX_HISTORY = 100 as a local constant — an important capacity limit. Steps: (1) add CLOUD_HEARTBEAT_RPC_TIMEOUT_MS = 10_000 and CLOUD_COMMAND_QUEUE_MAX_HISTORY = 100 to src/config/defaults.ts with descriptive comments; (2) import and replace AbortSignal.timeout(10_000) in reporter.ts:202 with AbortSignal.timeout(CLOUD_HEARTBEAT_RPC_TIMEOUT_MS); (3) import and replace MAX_HISTORY in queue.ts:28 with CLOUD_COMMAND_QUEUE_MAX_HISTORY; (4) run cloud/ tests to confirm no regression. Scope: 3 files, ~6 lines changed. Zero logic change — pure constant extraction.
